message:
test(observability): add comprehensive conflict observer tests (bd-t6sv2.1)

Add 20 new tests strengthening conflict observability coverage:
- 7 integration tests in core_types verifying InProcessPageLockTable
  emits PageLockContention events during real contention scenarios
  (including rebuild/draining, set_observer, reset, zero-overhead)
- 13 unit tests in fsqlite-observability covering ring buffer stress,
  edge cases (cap=1, wrap+clear), all FCW merge combinations, all SSI
  abort categories, hotspot ordering, serde roundtrip, and
  MetricsObserver chronological ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
